title: Monster
tmdbOverview: After an outburst at school involving her son, a concerned single mother demands answers, triggering a sequence of deepening suspicion and turmoil.
synopsis: Monster (2023) is a mystery, thriller and drama film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.8 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
